evidence_policy: Public crawl evidence only. Records are draft reconciliation data; employment, lifecycle, and publication require authoritative review.

items.title: News
items.description: Stay updated with the latest news from MIT-WPU. Read about student achievements, research breakthroughs, campus events, and university announcements.

items.title: A Stellar Odyssey: Anurag Vaidya's Journey from MIT-WPU to ISRO
items.description: MIT-WPU extends its heartfelt congratulations to the distinguished alumnus and ISRO scientist, Anurag Vaidya. Anurag Vaidya's remarkable journey from being a student at MIT-WPU to becoming an integral part of ISRO's endeavors serves as an inspiration for both current and future generations of mechanical engineering students

items.title: Shubharambh 2024
items.description: Shubharambh 2024, the grand induction festival of MIT-WPU, commenced with a vibrant preface by the anchor, setting the tone for an inspiring day. The ceremonial lamp lighting followed by a rendition of the World Peace Prayer infused the atmosphere with a sense of serenity and purpose.

items.title: MIT-WPU Reaches for the Stars: Historic Achievement in ISRO's PSLV-C60 Launch
items.description: MIT-WPU celebrates a proud moment as its contribution features in ISRO’s PSLV-C60 mission—highlighting innovation, research, and national progress.

items.title: MIT-WPU Co-Creation Programme: Empowering Students to Solve Societal Challenges
items.description: MIT World Peace University (MIT-WPU) is proud to announce the commencement of its innovative Co-Creation Programme, designed specifically for first-year undergraduate students to address pressing societal challenges. Scheduled from January 6 to January 11, 2025.

items.title: MIT-WPU Successfully Hosts 90th Annual Conference of the Indian Mathematical Society
items.description: In a groundbreaking achievement, MIT World Peace University (MIT-WPU) became the first private university to host the prestigious 90th Annual Conference of the Indian Mathematical Society (IMS). The four-day international conference, held from December 23rd to 26th, 2024.

items.title: Team Piranha Racing Dominates BAJA 2025 With Engineering Mastery
items.description: MIT-WPU's Team Piranha Racing showcases engineering mastery and dominates the BAJA 2025 competition. Read about their incredible performance.

items.description: MIT‑WPU opens a state‑of‑the‑art Central Research Facility to accelerate interdisciplinary research and innovation.

items.title: Bridging Law and Peace: Insights from the 4th International Symposium on Law and Peace
items.description: The 4th International Symposium on Law and Peace, held on November 22 & 23, 2024, at MIT World Peace University (MIT-WPU), was a pivotal event that highlighted the integral relationship between peace, human rights, and legal frameworks.

items.title: CXO Meet 2025: Industry Leaders Address AI's Potential and Ethical Challenges
items.description: The Ramcharan School of Leadership successfully hosted the CXO Meet 2025, where industry leaders and experts gathered to discuss the transformative potential of Artificial Intelligence (AI) while emphasising critical concerns around ethics, regulation, and misuse.

items.title: Udyamostav 2025: A Remarkable Celebration of National Startup Day

B.T. Pandit, PVSM, VrC (Retd.), who was warmly welcomed by our Executive President, Dr. Rahul V. Karad.

items.description: We are thrilled to celebrate the outstanding achievements of our students at the 62nd National Championship 2024, held in Bangalore from December 5th to December 15th. Their dedication, perseverance, and exceptional skills have brought home well-deserved accolades!

items.title: NLC Bharat 2025: Empowering Leaders, Strengthening Democracy
items.description: The National Legislators' Conference (NLC) Bharat Capacity Enhancement Program 2025 has successfully concluded, marking a milestone in strengthening India's democratic framework. This transformative two-day conference, held on 8-9 February 2025.

This is a fantastic accomplishment and MIT-WPU is incredibly proud of his dedication and skill. Well done, Shantanu!

items.description: MIT-WPU is proud to share that Dr. Anand J Kulkarni, Professor & Associate Director, Research Institute of Artificial Intelligence (Center of Excellence of AI) was recently featured in an exclusive LIVE interview on DD Sahyadri as part of the special discussion series 'Aatmanirbhar Bharat' on 07 February 2025.

items.title: A Tribute to a Legend : MIT-WPU Honors Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj's Legacy
items.description: MIT‑WPU pays tribute to Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, celebrating leadership, valor, and nation‑building ideals.

items.title: Shaping the Future of HR: MIT-WPU Annual HR Conclave 2025
items.description: The convergence of industry expertise and academic excellence marked MIT World Peace University's Annual HR Conclave 2025, where the Department of Liberal Arts partnered with HR Shapers Group. This dynamic gathering, held on 22 February 2025, emerged as a hub of innovation, bringing together over 100 HR professionals to explore ground-breaking strategies reshaping the future of human resources.

items.title: Pioneering Clean Energy Research: MIT-WPU's Strategic Visit to CETRI, Canada
items.description: Prof. Murthy Chavali, Dean R&D, and Prof. Niraj S. Topare from Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University, Pune, recently visited the prestigious Clean Energy Technologies Research Institute (CETRI) at the University of Regina, Canada. This strategic visit was facilitated by Prof. Hussameldin Ibrahim, Director of CETRI and Professor in Industrial and Process Systems Engineering.

items.title: MIT-WPU SUMMIT'25: A National Celebration of Youth Sports Excellence

items.description: MIT World Peace University (MIT-WPU) has taken a significant step forward in fostering international academic cooperation by formalising a partnership with SRH University, Germany. This strategic alliance was solidified through a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) signed by Dr. Rahul V. Karad, Executive President of MIT-WPU

items.title: MIT-WPU Celebrates Excellence: Dr. Bharat Kale Receives Prestigious Award by CSI
items.description: MIT World Peace University proudly announces that Dr. Bharat Kale, Emeritus Professor & Director of Material Science [COE], has been honoured with the prestigious Prof. S. K. Bhattacharya Eminent Scientist Award (2020) from the Catalysis Society of India (CSI) for his outstanding research in Photocatalysis.

items.description: The School of Health Sciences and Technology at MIT-WPU, Pune, in collaboration with the Pharmacy Council of India, New Delhi, successfully hosted a transformative one-day National Workshop on Entrepreneurship and Startups in Pharma and Pharmacy Practice on 06 March 2025 at MIT-WPU Campus.

items.title: MIT-WPU Team Clinches Top Position at Hackademia 2025
items.description: MIT-WPU's team of computer science students demonstrated exceptional talent and innovation at Hackademia, organised by BMC Software, Pune, from 21-24 February 2025. Competing against seven prestigious colleges including MIT AOE, PCCOE, SIT, PICT, VIIT, and Cummins, our team emerged victorious, securing the First Prize in the Group 1 category of this highly competitive hackathon

items.description: The Rural Immersion Programme 2025 was a transforming experience for MIT-WPU students offering a unique window into rural life and community development in Hivare Bazar, Ahmednagar. Complementing MIT-WPU's dedication to academic achievement, social responsibility, and holistic learning, the programme sought to link theoretical knowledge with practical, real-world experience.

items.title: NAIP Organized by MIT-WPU in Collaboration with RV University
items.description: The National Academic Immersion Program (NAIP) is a flagship initiative organised by MIT World Peace University (MIT-WPU), Pune, in collaboration with RV University (RVU), Bengaluru. This immersion programme took place from 18th to 27th December 2024 and was joined by 93 students and 5 faculty members. This programme aimed at combining academic orientation, industrial exposure, and cultural enrichment into a holistic learning experience for the students. The carefully curated schedule featured activities such as patent drafting workshops, industrial and cultural visits, and interactive sessions with industry experts, all designed to nurture innovation and interdisciplinary collaboration among students.

items.title: Ms. Shreyasi Joshi
items.description: MIT-WPU celebrates the exceptional achievements of Ms. Shreyasi Joshi, a B.Tech CSE student, in slalom skating.

items.title: A Visit To Malwadi Village Bhor
A visit to Sarole (Khurd) Village, Nashik
items.description: As part of MIT-WPU's Rural Immersion Programme, female students from SY BBA IB visited Sarole (Khurd) village, Nashik from 1st to 5th April 2025. During this immersion programme, these students engaged directly with the rural community, bridging academic concepts with ground realities.

items.title: A visit to Ranwad Village
items.description: This year the Rural Immersion Program took place in Ranwad village, Nashik district, from April 1st to 5th. This initiative, led by Associate Dean (External Affairs) Dr. Swati Bankar and coordinated by Dr. Renuka Deshmukh, involved 36 female students from SY BBA Division F, accompanied by two female faculty members. The programme aimed to enhance students' sensitivity to rural issues through immersive, experiential learning experiences.

items.title: MIT-WPU & ICMAI: A Landmark Partnership
items.description: We are delighted to announce a groundbreaking Memorandum of Understanding signed on 11 March 2025, between MIT World Peace University and the Institute of Cost Accountants of India (ICMAI). items.description: Team Vegapod Hyperloop, the official Hyperloop Club of MIT World Peace University (MIT- WPU), Pune, has earned international acclaim by delivering an outstanding performance at the European Hyperloop Week (EHW) 2026, held at the European Hyperloop Center, Groningen, The Netherlands.

items.title: Aaditya Talkhande
Team AVION Secures National Recognition at NIDAR 2025
items.description: MIT-WPU congratulates Team AVION (Aerial Vehicle Innovation in Operation and Navigation) for its commendable performance at NIDAR 2025, a national-level drone innovation competition held at Gautam Buddha University, Greater Noida.

items.title: MIT-WPU Hosts ICSSCC-2026 to Advance Sustainable Smart Computing and Communication Research
items.description: The School of Computer Science and Engineering at Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University, Pune, successfully organized the 2nd International Conference on Sustainable Smart Computing and Communications (ICSSCC- 2026) on 13–14 March 2026.

items.title: MIT-WPU School of Law Inaugurates Upgraded Free Legal Aid Clinic
items.description: The School of Law at Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University (MIT-WPU), Pune, inaugurated its Upgraded Free Legal Aid Clinic on 30 August 2025, reaffirming the University's commitment to promoting access to justice, legal awareness, and experiential legal education.

items.title: National Academic Immersion Programme at MCOPS, MAHE, Manipal
items.description: The Department of Pharmaceutical Sciences, School of Health Sciences and Technology, Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University (MIT-WPU), Pune, successfully conducted the National Academic Immersion Programme (NAIP) 2026 at the Manipal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences (MCOPS), Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE), Manipal.

items.title: Magma 2026-Geothermal Energy Technical Event
items.description: The Department of Petroleum Engineering at Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University (MIT-WPU), Pune, successfully organized Magma 2026, a technical event focused on the study and advancement of geothermal energy.

items.title: PRIDE 2.0-Promoting Research, Innovation, Design and Entrepreneurship
items.description: The Department of Petroleum Engineering at Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University (MIT-WPU), Pune, successfully organized PRIDE 2.0 – Promoting Research, Innovation, Design & Entrepreneurship, a project presentation competition that encouraged students to showcase their research-driven ideas, innovative designs, and entrepreneurial solutions to real-world challenges.

items.title: MIT-WPU Tech Team Robocon Secures AIR 2 at DD Robocon India 2026
items.description: The MIT-WPU Tech Team Robocon has once again demonstrated its excellence in robotics and engineering innovation by securing All India Rank (AIR) 2 and emerging as the National Runner-up at DD Robocon India 2026, held at the Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Delhi on 4 and 5 July 2026.
